title: Echo Horn
description: Use an Echo Shard to upgrade a Goat Horn to perform sonic boom attacks
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Wunm6vrOWdQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Upgrade a _Goat Horn_ with an _Echo Shard_ in the smithing table using the _Ward Trim_. The horn is given a durability of 50.

Now, right-clicking with the horn will play the sound and create a sonic boom targeted at any players or mobs you are facing.

The sonic boom can hit entities through walls.
